text:
Patch configure.ac to recognize db46 (otherwise please exclude db46 from allowed bdb versions, WITH_BDB_VER=46 results in configure error).

Added file(s):
- files/patch-configure.ac

Port maintainer (udo.schweigert@siemens.com) is cc'd.
